nodes.name: Every day 14:00 UTC
nodes.notes: 9am US-Eastern. Adjust the cron once real send-window rules are confirmed in CAMPAIGN_SEND_RULES.md.

nodes.name: AI Decider (Claude Opus 4.8)
nodes.notes: Uses a Generic Header Auth credential: Name = x-api-key, Value = your Anthropic API key. Model claude-opus-4-8 with adaptive thinking + structured JSON output.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event_id: $json.event_id, run_date: $json.run_date, decision: $json.decision, channel: $json.channel, template_name: $json.template_name, reason: $json.reason }) }}

nodes.name: Log Decision
nodes.notes: Writes every decision (send + skip) to campaign_send_log. The actual send branch (off decision == 'send') hooks in here once per-market recipient lists exist — POST the chosen template + list to the gmail-bulk-send / telnyx-bulk-send webhook, then PATCH sent_at.
